title: trinacte ferruginea

side_effects: Trinacte ferruginea can have side effects if used improperly, such as gastrointestinal issues, including nausea, vomiting, and diarrhea, due to its high concentration of tannins and other compounds that can irritate the digestive system. In rare cases, using Trinacte ferruginea improperly can cause allergic reactions, such as skin rashes, itching, and difficulty breathing. It is essential to consult a healthcare professional before using Trinacte ferruginea to avoid these potential side effects and ensure safe and effective use.
